digest.greeting: Friday, June 5, Jean. Today is anchored by the Phase 2 Weekly IT Projects Sync, CoE Sync Jean, the EPMO EOW Check In, a 3:00 PM project-status overlap, and the 4:00 PM Javier Hurtado interview. You have 8 calendar blocks, 15 carried-over checklist items, 1 reminder, and 3 urgent/high-interest items. The top priorities are security review for the new GitHub token alerts, closing aging CoE/KPI/Nadia carry-overs, and deciding the 3:00 PM conflict; the clearest operational risk is that Teams broad thread discovery returned a 502, so Teams coverage is based on unread chats and targeted recent chat reads rather than a complete feed.

items.label: KPIs - confirm final approval
items.detail: Carry-over from Thursday's daily digest and still unchecked in GitHub state. Mid-Year Touchpoints launched in Rippling; confirm all KPIs are approved/finalized after the KPI Review with Sara and close this out.

items.label: Clarify Incident Response priority path
items.detail: Carry-over from Thursday. Teams context previously showed no response yet from Cristian Garcia or Chelsea related to Jill's prioritization direction. Action type: follow up; confirm leadership clarity and the next alignment path.

items.label: Check Supabase security warning
items.detail: Carry-over from Thursday. Review the unread Supabase critical table-publicly-accessible/RLS-disabled warning and decide whether the project is still active and needs remediation.

items.label: Follow up with TLs on CoE guide
items.detail: Carry-over from Thursday and originally from Wednesday. Dar seguimiento a los Team Leads sobre su revision del CoE Brief Guide con sus PMs/PEs. Janet confirmed her team; verify the remaining Team Leads.

items.label: Complete Nadia's affected-areas request
items.detail: Carry-over from Thursday and originally from Wednesday. Complete Nadia Wilson's request on affected project areas for the EPMO; the Salesforce Program Overview remains the supporting context.

items.label: Align CoE priorities with Jorge
items.detail: Carry-over from Thursday. Review Jorge Grijalva's Portfolio Review Summary and follow up or decide the CoE priorities and upcoming work alignment.

items.label: Review Rippling task queue
items.detail: Carry-over from Thursday. Rippling reported the Incident Response Survey due June 12 plus an overdue harassment prevention training task from December 9, 2025. Action type: review/complete.

items.label: Decide whether to restore expired recording
items.detail: Carry-over from Thursday. SharePoint said the Weekly Touchpoint Staff Augmentation Project meeting recording expired and was deleted. Restore from recycle bin only if that recording is still needed for Staff Augmentation context.

items.label: Submit Isaac Gomez Ventura interview feedback
items.detail: Carry-over from Thursday. Rippling requested Jean's feedback on Isaac Gomez Ventura for Project Coordinator and asked that it be submitted promptly to keep recruiting moving.

items.label: Review Staff Aug PRD reply from Andrea
items.detail: Carry-over from Thursday. Andrea Rodriguez sent detailed Staff Aug PRD input on rider matching, autopopulation, state/location handling, Ops status, address prediction, and court-information lookup items. Decide whether EPMO needs to respond or fold the input into the PRD path.

items.label: Monitor request #0027951
items.detail: Carry-over from Thursday. Mar Garcia followed up with Dana on request #0027951 and copied Jean and Anu Puri. Monitor or follow up if EPMO needs to help escalate after Dana responds.

items.label: Portfolio Review Summary & Action Items
items.detail: Carry-over from Thursday's email section. Jorge Grijalva's summary says statuses, priorities, ownership, and notes were updated in the portfolio tracker; ensure CoE priorities and upcoming work are aligned.

items.label: Jhara - OneDrive/SharePoint and Venn issue
items.detail: Carry-over from Thursday's Teams section. Jhara asked whether others are seeing the same OneDrive/SharePoint issue and whether Venn is involved. Close this only after the team confirms status.

items.label: Incident Response priority still needs clarity
items.detail: Carry-over from Thursday's Teams section and related to the Incident Response priority path. Keep this as a risk signal until the prioritization response and next call are confirmed.

items.label: EPMO Team Meeting poll themes
items.detail: Carry-over from Thursday's Teams section. Recent EPMO Team Meeting chat activity was mostly informational around blockers, approvals, scope creep, and turning stakeholder language into action items; no direct ask for Jean was visible.

items.label: Co-counsel network stakeholder follow-up
items.detail: One-shot reminder from briefing_state.json: Seguimiento a stakeholders de Co-counsel network project. Go/no-go? Showing today and archiving after this digest.

sections.title: Today's Schedule
sections.note: Times shown in Jean's Outlook working timezone. The main compression is 11:00 AM-12:00 PM, and the main conflict is the 3:00 PM overlap.

items.label: TRACE & Staff Aug touchpoint
items.detail: 15-minute touchpoint with Yuri Almeida. Good place to keep Staff Aug PRD and TRACE items from slipping.

items.label: Phase 2 Weekly IT Projects Sync
items.detail: Weekly project sync. Andrea Rodriguez declined this occurrence; watch for any updates that need asynchronous follow-up.

items.label: CoE Sync Jean
items.detail: Mar Garcia's CoE sync with Jean and David. Use this to move the CoE guide/TL follow-up and CoE priority alignment forward.

items.label: touchpoint w/ Jean
items.detail: Overlaps the second half of CoE Sync Jean. Topic is internal situation on CM CoE and the do-not-call-list meeting, so confirm which discussion needs priority.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Protected focus window after the compressed CoE block. Best use: clear one security or carry-over item before the EOW check-in.

items.label: EPMO EOW Check In
items.detail: Sara moved this one hour earlier and added Nadia so programmatic updates can be included. Bring the open Nadia, CoE, and portfolio items.

items.label: IT Litify Sprint #12 Planning / Executive Project Status Slide Update
items.detail: Direct overlap. Sprint #12 planning is stakeholder-heavy; the project-status deck update is Jean-organized with Yuri, Jhara, and Mar. Decide which one Jean should attend live and which can be delegated or updated asynchronously.

items.label: Interview - Javier Hurtado - Project Coordinator
items.detail: Interview with Eugenia Barragan and Jean. Review candidate materials before 4:00 PM and submit feedback after the interview.

items.label: Review GitHub token alerts
items.detail: Unread GitHub email this morning says a classic personal access token named token2 was added with admin:repo_hook and repo scopes. Related unread GitHub emails from Thursday also mention token creation and a personal access token found in a commit. Action type: review/revoke or confirm legitimacy immediately because it can affect repository security.

items.label: Prepare Javier interview and feedback
items.detail: Outlook shows the Javier Hurtado Project Coordinator interview at 4:00 PM with candidate profile, LinkedIn, resume, and cover-letter links in the invite. Action type: prepare before the meeting and submit feedback afterward.

items.label: Choose the 3:00 PM live priority
items.detail: Outlook shows IT Litify Sprint #12 Planning and Executive Project Status Slide Update at the same time. Action type: decide/delegate; pick which meeting Jean attends live and ensure the other has coverage or async updates.

items.label: Confirm Jessica taskset follow-up
items.detail: Teams shows Jessica Richburg updated a taskset and said she is still waiting on IT. Jean told Jessica that Mar Garcia would get back to her today. Action type: delegate/follow up with Mar so the commitment is closed.

items.label: Validate Phone Ops escalation
items.detail: Teams with Jhara shows Jean escalated the RingCentral/phone issue to Phone Ops after Jhara reported client voicemail/number behavior. Action type: follow up if Phone Ops has not confirmed resolution.

items.label: GitHub personal access token alert
items.detail: From GitHub at 7:51 AM AST. A classic token named token2 was added with admin:repo_hook and repo scopes; related Thursday GitHub messages mention a token found in a commit. Treat as security review rather than normal FYI.

items.label: Incident Response Survey results timing
items.detail: Nikki Adkins replied Thursday that once the survey closes, she can send Jean the data file and added a calendar reminder to do so. This is waiting on survey close, not Jean.

items.label: Access: Excel for Windows ticket
items.detail: Overnight IT thread says Andrea could install Windows App on Mac but cannot sign in with her LLF M365 account; Dan Mackey noted sign-ins do not appear to route through Venn egress and are failing the enforcement CAP. Monitor if this affects the Venn/OneDrive access workstream.

sections.title: Teams Highlights
sections.note: Broad recent-thread discovery returned a 502, so this section uses unread chats and targeted recent chat reads only.

items.label: Mar owes Jessica taskset update
items.detail: In a group chat with Jessica Richburg and Mar Garcia, Jessica said she updated the taskset and is waiting on IT. Jean replied that Mar would get back to Jessica today.

items.label: Jhara phone issue escalated
items.detail: Jhara reported RingCentral/client voicemail behavior on Thursday. Jean said it was escalated to Phone Ops; follow up only if Phone Ops has not confirmed resolution.

items.label: EPMO Team Meeting chat is informational
items.detail: Recent EPMO Team Meeting messages are mostly poll/toolkit and meeting-flow chatter, with no direct Jean ask visible in the targeted read.

items.label: Jean - OOO
items.detail: Outlook shows Jean OOO for Monday, June 8. David also has OOO, Santiago is OOO, and Mar has an OOO block from the morning through late afternoon.

items.label: Approve Timecards & Prepare for the Week
items.detail: Recurring Monday preparation block.

items.label: TRACE & Staff Aug touchpoint
items.detail: 15-minute touchpoint with Yuri Almeida.

items.label: 1:1 Shelley & Jean
items.detail: Purpose is to understand department needs and how Jean can support Shelley.

items.label: EPMO Portfolio Review
items.detail: Sara's weekly portfolio review to review new project requests and assign next steps.

items.label: PMs Workshop
items.detail: Workshop with PMs to discuss capability improvement, areas for improvement, and wins.
